name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-40
title: test-hook-enforcement.py and test-team-wide-permissions.py mutate live source files (race-condition + corruption risk)
description: test-hook-enforcement.py lines 67-84 and 99-131 write to the REAL repo's .rabbit-scope-active marker and feature.json (toggle tdd_state to test-red/test-green and back). test-scope-per-feature-marker.py mutates the same feature.json. test-team-wide-permissions.py lines 103-156 mutates .claude/features/rabbit-cage/settings.json (live source) by appending a probe deny entry, then restores via finally block. If any test crashes mid-run or two tests run concurrently, the live source files are left in inconsistent state (test-green stays in feature.json, scope marker stays set). These tests should operate on temporary copies, not the live repository state. Risk: corrupted commits, false scope-guard denies in subsequent sessions.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 2 PR. session-init R1 implementation restored (BUG-17); sync-check drift color now RED (BUG-34); tests use isolated temp-dir fixtures (BUG-40); scope-guard DENIES on unresolvable feature (BUG-43); @-import handling fixed (BUG-78). 9 new e2e tests; all 39 rabbit-cage suites pass.
